profiling.blocker: ERR_NVGPUCTRPERM: current user lacks NVIDIA GPU performance-counter permission.
profiling.resolution: Create /etc/modprobe.d/nvidia-profiler.conf with: options nvidia NVreg_RestrictProfilingToAdminUsers=0; then run update-initramfs and reboot.

open_decisions.question: Proposal names reduction-cuda, but current HecBench commit contains atomicReduction-cuda. Confirm intended kernel.
Confirm smem_atomics as the selected histogram variant.
Confirm whether to enable DUMP output for reference comparisons or add a compact checksum path.
Enable performance-counter permissions before baseline profile capture.
